data.body: COMPLETION-GATE REMEDIATION: verifier (reading landed main) found AC-letter gaps in 1fdc (no pre-repair fsck-flag assertion), 5977 (no CLI/MCP-edit whitespace + no cross-facade oversized rejection), 2da6 (smoke file not renamed/linkage-only; schema test not using parse_structured w/ exact payload). 25aa cleared via CI-attestation comment (closed). Fixed all 3 (test-only): pushed fixup stack changes 621=1fdc 622=5977 623=2da6. Closed so far: 4001,44b7,1d1b,f476,a263,25aa. Awaiting gates on 621-623 -> land -> update main -> close 1fdc,5977,2da6 -> close epic.
